name: Skeleton Patrol
description: The clatter of bone on stone echoes across the old battleground. A patrol of skeletal warriors marches in grim formation, rusted blades still clutched in fleshless hands, bound to an oath they swore in life and cannot break in death.
failureConsequence: The undead patrol overwhelms you with tireless, mechanical strikes. You flee into the night, your shield arm numb and your courage badly shaken.
